included: proportional short and full Outcome-First and Reuse-First preflight
schema v2 classification and independent preflight review
conditional web, integration, state, and Hermes acceptance
excluded: Hermes as a required capability for projects that did not opt in
Hermes as a mandatory LLM proxy or authoritative product store
project-specific superseded technologies as inherited startup defaults
short mode for features, integrations, external actions, or product experiments
